**Update `entry_detail_handler`** (dashboard/mod.rs ~line 642) — add new fields to the metadata object:

```rust
"metadata": {
    "source_file": entry.metadata.source_file,
    "language": entry.metadata.language,
    "content_role": entry.metadata.content_role,
    "source_origin": entry.metadata.source_origin,
},
```

**Update `graph_scope_handler`** — add new fields to each node's JSON in the nodes array:

```rust
"content_role": node.metadata.content_role,
"source_origin": node.metadata.source_origin,
```

Also update the `entry_history_handler` similarly so history entries carry the metadata.
